pi_items.source: iDempiere Attribute Set (Window ID-256) official documentation confirms M_AttributeSet is the table for attribute set configuration
Task description specifies 'Search Key (Value): SER_LOT_TRACK'. The Value field in iDempiere tables is the search key field used for identification and lookup.
Task description specifies 'Name: Serialized Lot Tracking'. The Name field is a standard field in iDempiere Attribute Set window.
Task description specifies 'Guarantee Days: 365'. iDempiere Attribute Set window documentation confirms GuaranteeDays field exists for defining product guarantee/availability days.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on iDempiere's M_AttributeSet table, which is the standard table for managing product attribute sets. The task requires creating an attribute set with Search Key 'SER_LOT_TRACK', Name 'Serialized Lot Tracking', and Guarantee Days of 365 days. The M_AttributeSet table contains fields for enabling serial number tracking (IsSerNo), lot number tracking (IsLot), guarantee days (GuaranteeDays), and instance attribute designation (IsInstanceAttribute). The task uses GardenWorld, the standard iDempiere sample client. The data being manipulated is not synthetic—it involves creating a new record in a real ERP system database.
